issue.title: SVG-to-PNG Converter (Advanced Options)
issue.description:
## Overview
A privacy-focused utility to convert SVG code or files into PNG images directly in the browser. 

## Features
- **Live Preview** — Visual representation of the SVG before conversion.
- **Advanced Resolution Control** — Option to specify exact output width/height or a scale factor (1x, 2x, 4x).
- **Drag & Drop** — Support for both raw SVG text and file uploads.
- **Privacy** — 100% client-side logic.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Correctly renders SVGs to Canvas and exports as PNG.
- [ ] Minimalist UI: Input area, dimension controls, and a "Download PNG" button.
- [ ] Handles complex SVGs with transparency and gradients.
- [ ] Support for specifying output resolution without quality loss.
- [ ] Fast processing for standard vector assets.
